sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا حِمَايَةُ مَعْلُومَاتِنَا الشَّخْصِيَّةِ عِنْدَ اسْتِخْدَامِ الْإِنْتِرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Moramo zaštititi naše lične podatke prilikom korištenja interneta.
sentences.translationEn: We must protect our personal information when using the internet.

sentences.arabic: الْأَمْنُ السَّيْبِرَانِيُّ يُسَاعِدُ فِي مَنْعِ اخْتِرَاقِ الْحِسَابَاتِ الْإِلِكْتْرُونِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Kibernetička sigurnost pomaže u sprječavanju hakovanja elektronskih računa.
sentences.translationEn: Cybersecurity helps in preventing the hacking of electronic accounts.

sentences.arabic: يَنْصَحُ الْخُبَرَاءُ بِاسْتِخْدَامِ كَلِمَاتِ مُرُورٍ قَوِيَّةٍ وَمُخْتَلِفَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Stručnjaci savjetuju korištenje jakih i različitih lozinki.
sentences.translationEn: Experts advise using strong and different passwords.
